_disclosure: These outcomes were computed by hand against participants.json, ofac_watchlist.json, transaction_log.json, and regulatory_chunks.json BEFORE any agent/tool code was written. Purpose: give step 13 (end-to-end run) a ground truth to check the built system against, rather than eyeballing whether output 'looks right'. If the built system disagrees with a row here, that is a bug to investigate -- in either the code or this hand-computation -- not something to silently accept.

expected_outcomes.reach: PASS - routing 999000100 (Meridian Trust Bank) is active, $4,500 is within its $10,000,000 institution cap
expected_outcomes.regulatory: PASS - remittance_information is 37 chars, well under the 140-char limit; all required fields present
expected_outcomes.sanctions: PASS - 'Fenwick Analytics Partners' does not resemble any watchlist entry; expected score well under 0.65
expected_outcomes.fraud: PASS - not present in transaction_log (no duplicate); not round-number, not off-hours, first-time beneficiary alone insufficient to breach 0.65 threshold

expected_outcomes.reach: HOLD - routing 999000105 (Somerset Prairie Bank) is marked active=false in participants.json
expected_outcomes.regulatory: NOT_RUN - fail-fast, Reach HOLD suspends remaining pillars

expected_outcomes.reach: HOLD - routing 999000106 (Ashgrove Mercantile Bank) is active but institution_cap is $2,000,000; instructed amount $3,250,000 exceeds it

expected_outcomes.regulatory: HOLD - remittance_information is 189 characters, exceeds the verified 140-character limit (chunk RULE-REMIT-001)

expected_outcomes.sanctions: HOLD - 'Viktor A. Marchetti' exact string match to watchlist entry SYN-SDN-0001; expected score > 0.85, confirmed match band

NEAR_MISS - 'Daniel R. Osei-Mensah' shares given name, middle initial, and root surname with watchlist entry SYN-SDN-0003 ('Daniel R. Osei'); expected score in 0.65-0.85 band. Must trigger ToT (BFS, Generator/Critic/Decision-Maker), and the surviving branch is a RECOMMENDATION only -- final resolution requires a human Decider and is NOT auto-resolved to PASS or HOLD by this system.
expected_outcomes.fraud: NOT_RUN - Sanctions pillar has not concluded pending Decider sign-off; fraud check deferred by design
expected_outcomes.grading_note: The correctness check for this scenario is NOT 'did the agent pick PASS or HOLD' -- it is: (1) did the tool correctly classify the score into the near-miss band, (2) did ToT actually run, (3) did the system correctly refuse to auto-resolve and escalate to Decider instead. This maps directly to the 'Escalation-Routing Accuracy' metric from the Module 6 evaluation design.

expected_outcomes.sanctions: PASS - neither party resembles any watchlist entry
expected_outcomes.fraud: HOLD - matches transaction_log entry INSTR-2026-000412 on debtor, creditor, amount ($61,000), and reference ('PO-4471'); submitted 4.5 minutes later, inside the 10-minute window

expected_outcomes.sanctions: PASS - 'Thornbury Capital Ventures' does not resemble any watchlist entry
expected_outcomes.fraud: HOLD - round-number amount ($500,000 exactly), beneficiary absent from transaction_log (first-time), vague/non-specific remittance reference, submission at 03:14 UTC (off-hours) -- combination expected to exceed the 0.65 behavioral risk threshold

expected_outcomes.REFERENCE_ONLY_NOT_PART_OF_CORE_EVAL_SET: This scenario exercises reference/enrichment_agent_concept.py directly and in isolation. It is NOT run through the MVP orchestrator and does not count toward the 8-scenario core evaluation set below. See reference/enrichment_agent_concept.py module docstring.
expected_outcomes.reach: PASS - routing 999000100 (Meridian Trust Bank) active, within cap
expected_outcomes.regulatory: HOLD - remittance_information is 166 chars, exceeds the 140-char limit
expected_outcomes.grading_note: This scenario has TWO valid outcomes depending on REMEDIATION_MODE, both verified against the standalone reference module: (1) mode='human_in_the_loop' -> HOLD, escalated=true, escalation_role=Validator, identical treatment to SCN-04 in the actual MVP pipeline. (2) mode='agentic' -> Enrichment Agent truncates remittance_information from 166 to 134 chars, re-validates successfully. Neither path is reachable through the actual orchestrator; both were verified only against the reference module directly.
expected_outcomes.final_verdict_agentic_mode: PASS (pending Sanctions/Fraud on corrected instruction, both of which independently clear against this beneficiary/amount)

summary.reference_only_scenario_note: SCN-09 exercises reference/enrichment_agent_concept.py in isolation, not the orchestrator. Not included in core totals below.
